ddls:
CREATE TABLE "absences" (
  "absence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absence record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who is absent */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for absence */,
  "absence_date" TEXT /* Date of the absence */,
  "transportation_expense" REAL /* Transportation expense incurred by the employee */,
  "distance_to_work" REAL /* Distance in kilometers from home to work */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "daily_work_load_avg" REAL /* Average daily workload in hours */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index of the employee */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the employee (e.g., high school, bachelor, master) */,
  "children_count" INTEGER /* Number of children the employee has */,
  "pets_count" INTEGER /* Number of pets the employee has */,
  "absenteeism_hours" REAL /* Total hours of absenteeism */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position of the employee */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the employee (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the absence is part of a recurring pattern */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved the absence */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the absence was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES absence_reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absence_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the absence reason */,
  "is_medical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reason is medical in nature */,
  "is_emergency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reason is an emergency */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the absence is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the employee belongs */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee in the organization */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee (e.g., single, married) */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., high school, bachelor, master) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation expense record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee incurring the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport used (e.g., car, bus, train) */,
  "is_reimbursable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense is reimbursable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_expenses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pets" (
  "pet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pet record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee owning the pet */,
  "pet_type" TEXT /* Type of the pet (e.g., dog, cat) */,
  "pet_count" INTEGER /* Number of pets of that type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pets_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee with children */,
  "child_count" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_children_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "absence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the absence record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the record (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_absence_id FOREIGN KEY ("absence_id") REFERENCES absences ("absence_id")
)
